shards.content:
WORLD: The Iron Crown
GENRE: Skyborne Fantasy | TONE: GRIM

CROWN FACTION: The General
CREW FACTION: The Resistance

WORLD STRUCTURE (G.R.A.P.E.S.):
  GEOGRAPHY: Floating sky-islands
  RELIGION: Machine-god technofaith
  ACHIEVEMENTS: Mapped the planar boundaries
  POLITICS: Puppet state (controlled from abroad)
  ECONOMICS: Gold-standard mercantile trade
  SOCIAL: Wealth-based social mobility

WORLD PRIMER:
The Iron Crown is a land of Floating sky-islands. The people follow Machine-god technofaith. Their greatest achievement: Mapped the planar boundaries. Power rests with The General — Order through strength. Discipline is law.. In the shadows, The Resistance — Freedom fighters or terrorists — depends who you ask.. The economy runs on Gold-standard mercantile trade. Society is defined by Wealth-based social mobility.
